basic_details.job_title: IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: PG Degree in Basic Science or Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in Professional Course with NET/GATE qualification, Minimum 60% marks or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards and 55% in Classes 10th and 12th, Exposure to programming in MATLAB/C/Python and basic electronics (desirable)
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): PG Degree in Basic Science OR Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in Professional Course selected through National Eligibility Tests - CSIR-UGC NET including lectureship or GATE or National level examinations by Central Government Departments; Minimum 60% or equivalent from Graduation onwards and 55% in 10th and 12th; Desired streams: Biomedical Engineering/ Biotechnology/ Biosciences and Bioengineering/ Materials Science and Materials Engineering/ Mechanical/ Electrical Engineering with first division.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Indore to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Indore JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow (JRF) recruitment is 08-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the JRF post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at IIT Indore.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a PG Degree in Basic Science or a Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in a Professional Course with NET/GATE qualification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post is 30 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 37,000 per month plus 20% HRA.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online for the IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow (JRF) recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What are the desirable skills for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Exposure to programming in MATLAB/C/Python and basic electronics are desirable skills for the JRF position.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article.
